meanings.definition: cause to be structured or ordered or operating according to some principle or idea

examples: Can you help me organize my files?

meanings.definition: arrange by systematic planning and united effort
examples: devise a plan to take over the director's office
The auto workers decided to unionize

meanings.definition: formed into a structured or coherent whole
methodical and efficient in arrangement or function
examples: his life was almost too organized

meanings.definition: being a member of or formed into a labor union
